_comment: ATS watchlist — companies whose job boards watchlist_poller.py polls directly. 'hints' are slug guesses for discovery; after running watchlist_discover.py each entry gains 'ats' + 'slug' (or 'ats': 'not_found'). Categories are informational. hq drives location preference but the poller filters per-job location anyway.
